Examples.Title: Text To Speech
Examples.Code:
### Text To Speech
# @name text_to_speech_v1_text_to_speech__voice_id__post
POST {{host}}/v1/text-to-speech/{{voice_id}}?output_format=wav
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
xi-api-key: {{xi-api-key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "text": "string",
  "model_id": "hexgrad/Kokoro-82M",
  "output_format": "wav",
  "language_code": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Text To Speech Stream
Examples.Code:
### Text To Speech Stream
# @name text_to_speech_stream_v1_text_to_speech__voice_id__stream_post
POST {{host}}/v1/text-to-speech/{{voice_id}}/stream?output_format=wav
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
xi-api-key: {{xi-api-key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "text": "string",
  "model_id": "hexgrad/Kokoro-82M",
  "output_format": "wav",
  "language_code": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json
